findings.evidence: `rg -n "symmetricPart"` shows only the def and lemmas at lines 33, 39, 45, 53; proofs currently use `simp [symmetricPart]`/`simp only [symmetricPart, ...]` at lines 48 and 56 rather than a named defining lemma.
findings.fix: Add a characteristic `symmetricPart_def` lemma, preferably a normal-form simp lemma if this expansion is intended for simplification, and use it instead of unfolding the body in proofs.
findings.issue: `TauCeti.Matrix.symmetricPart` is public but has no `symmetricPart_def` restatement, so downstream users must unfold the definition to recover `(2⁻¹ : ℝ) • (A + A.transpose)`.

summary: The new ellipticity stability lemmas are scoped to the roadmap target, but the new public `symmetricPart` definition is missing its basic defining API.
